title: Golden Syrian Cheese Bake
description: A warm, cheesy bake inspired by the flavors of the Middle East, perfect for a comforting snack or light meal.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the golden syrup, eggs, salt, and pepper.
Add the crumbled Syrian cheese and mix until well combined.
Stir in the softened creamy cheese until smooth.
Gradually add the flour, mixing until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Transfer the dough to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
